games.explanation: NYY is getting plus-money at +111 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Will Warren keeps NYY competitive on the mound against Ryan Pepiot. NYY holds a commanding 153-point Elo edge.
MIA is getting plus-money at +124 and the model thinks that's too cheap. MIA holds a commanding 87-point Elo edge.

Athletics is getting plus-money at +105 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Luis Morales keeps Athletics competitive on the mound against Anthony Kay. Slight run-scoring edge of 1.0 runs in the sim.
